APPEARANCES:
Philip S. Horne, Esq., (415) 552-2740 for Defendant and Moving Party.
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., (415) 956-8100 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
ARGUED:
DEFENDANT THECLA GLUECK'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED with 5 days leave to answer from notice of entry of order. Matter settled last night; however, opposing counsel does not stip to take the motion off calendar. Order signed. (301/JLW/AC). CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
